error:
Failed query: select "serviceRequests"."id", "serviceRequests"."tenant_id", "serviceRequests"."project_id", "serviceRequests"."project_name", "serviceRequests"."request_date", "serviceRequests"."requester", "serviceRequests"."requester_id", "serviceRequests"."required_date", "serviceRequests"."status", "serviceRequests"."final_justification", "serviceRequests"."overrun_justification", "serviceRequests"."is_warranty", "serviceRequests"."is_pre_op", "serviceRequests"."prospect_id", "serviceRequests"."rejection_history", "serviceRequests"."winner_selection", "serviceRequests"."created_at", "serviceRequests_items"."data" as "items", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."data" as "quoteResponses" from "service_requests" "serviceRequests" left join lateral (select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_array("serviceRequests_items"."id", "serviceRequests_items"."tenant_id", "serviceRequests_items"."service_request_id", "serviceRequests_items"."name", "serviceRequests_items"."quantity", "serviceRequests_items"."unit", "serviceRequests_items"."specifications", "serviceRequests_items"."is_unforeseen", "serviceRequests_items"."unforeseen_justification", "serviceRequests_items"."estimated_unit_cost")), '[]'::json) as "data" from "service_request_items" "serviceRequests_items" where "serviceRequests_items"."service_request_id" = "serviceRequests"."id") "serviceRequests_items" on true left join lateral (select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_array("serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."service_request_id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."supplier_id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."supplier_name", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."quote_number", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."delivery_days", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."payment_terms", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."quality_notes", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."total", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."currency", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."pdf_attachment_name", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."created_at", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."data")), '[]'::json) as "data" from "quote_responses" "serviceRequests_quoteResponses" left join lateral (select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_array("serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."quote_response_id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."service_request_item_id", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."unit_price", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."quality", "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."notes")), '[]'::json) as "data" from "quote_response_items" "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items" where "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items"."quote_response_id" = "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."id") "serviceRequests_quoteResponses_items" on true where "serviceRequests_quoteResponses"."service_request_id" = "serviceRequests"."id") "serviceRequests_quoteResponses" on true order by "serviceRequests"."created_at" desc
